repo_prior_art.cite: none; doc/API.md panel entries concern linear/FWL history-cell decompositions, not a PPML effect-space sign-region algorithm

published_prior_art.cite: MoreauKastler2025PTT §3.1 gives a two-unit/three-period PPML wrong-comparison calculation, but no certified multicohort sign-partition algorithm

Wooldridge2023NonlinearDiD §3.2 and §3.3 supply pooled canonical-link QMLE/imputation equivalence and analytic delta-method inference for aggregated ATT functionals; MoreauKastler2025PTT eq. (3.14) defines this PTT ratio and recommends a unit bootstrap

novelty_flags.label: Related work / Open-ended Question 2
novelty_flags.one_line: NagengastYotov2025, the PPML staggered-DiD gravity paper identified in Moreau-Kastler §3.2.1, is a closer omitted fully interacted PPML comparator and should be positioned against the proposed ratio-specific inference.

soundness_flags.label: Open-ended Question 1
soundness_flags.one_line: “Positive-effect region” and the condition that the inputs “admit one” are undefined, making the requested certification circular; define the exact subset of delta-space and its positivity criterion.

soundness_flags.label: Open-ended Question 2
soundness_flags.one_line: The stated inference premises omit multiplicative parallel trends, QMLE identification/nonsingularity, and moment conditions needed for Rhat_N to target PTT_N and admit a root-N score expansion.

soundness_flags.label: Open-ended Question 2
soundness_flags.one_line: mhat_gt is undefined when phat_g=0, C is population-defined rather than operationally selected, and Wald coverage requires an explicit nondegeneracy condition V>0.

soundness_flags.label: ass:cohort-share-limit
soundness_flags.one_line: With fixed-T iid clusters, the sample cohort share already obeys an LLN around its row expectation; if a common limiting share is intended, define p_g as that limit rather than again as the N-indexed E_N expectation.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Define a semialgebraic positive-effect set and require the frontier algorithm to state an input encoding, termination certificate, and complexity bound; include a T=3 worked instance with distinct pooled-PPML and PTT signs.

State the ratio estimator on an observable cohort set with a zero-cell convention, add V>0, finite-moment, correct-baseline-QMLE, and information-rank conditions, then derive the joint sandwich influence function explicitly.
Add NagengastYotov2025 and contrast its fully interacted PPML aggregation/inference with the counterfactual-share PTT ratio, identifying the exact functional not covered by its results.

recommended_next_step: Continue revision: make both open questions operationally well-posed, repair the inference conditions, and re-survey the fully interacted PPML comparator literature before advancing.
